Estimates from Stack Testing 2016 and Includes Fugitive Dust from Dust Audit 2007,  Different Production / 2016 CEM's Data,  Kiln 5 and Kiln 6 (June - December), K4 shutdown, Note: total particulate (TSP) is an average of 4 tests, PM10 and PM 2.5 is an average of 4 tests, for each kiln.  One TSP test had very low concentration of TSP, as a result the TSP average from the 4 tests was lower than PM10 (2 tests)
PM10 has had identical results since 2012 due to the construction on Kiln 6. Construction on Kiln 6 began in late 2012 and over the course of the kilns construction (2016) roads were constantly being moved. Making it impossible to calculate the road dust emissions. For 2017 a air dispersion model was conducted which includes road dust, this will be used as a baseline to calculate a more correct figure due to the reconfiguration of the plant.
